latestHandover: SESSION 11 COMPLETE (2026-03-13) — Phase 8 Gate 8A + BACK-01 + Gate 8B close-out. 10 tasks marked complete. Close-outs (already implemented, confirmed in code): ARCH-02-T1 (--ci flag in setup.sh), ARCH-02-T2 (--teardown in RESET_setup.sh), ENV-03-T1 (--force guard in RESET_setup.sh), ISO-02-T1 (seeds already split: seed_acacia.sql/seed_monash.sql/seed_test_framework.sql in /seeds/), ENV-04-T1 (test_cleanup.sql + pg_cron already implemented), ENV-04-T2 (__test_{run-id} convention already in testing-guide.md). New implementations: BACK-01-T1 (receptor-planner ci.yml scoped to pytest tests/unit/ -m unit), BACK-01-T2 (match-backend ci.yml new integration-tests job with Supabase boot + health poll), DOC-06-T1 (supabase-receptor docs/ONBOARDING.md written), CICD-09-T1 (supabase-receptor .github/actions/supabase-start/action.yml composite action — installs CLI, boots Supabase, polls PUBLISHABLE_KEY health gate, exports keys to GITHUB_ENV and step outputs). Open tasks: 22. NEXT SESSION: CICD-09-T2a (ADR note: composite action vs reusable workflow), SEC-03-T0/T1 (branch protection), BACK-01 remaining, ENV-05 staging deploy gates, plus k3s cluster provisioning is underway (user building live). Gate 8C (ARCH-03-T2 runner install) will be possible once 'kubectl get nodes' shows a Ready node.

sessionHistory.summary: Phase 1 (ADRs + pre-implementation docs) and Phase 2 (Helmfile + CI required check matrix) completed. 10 tasks marked complete. supabase-receptor audit branch created and pushed.

Phase 3 (Core Cluster Stack) completed. 21 tasks marked complete across supabase-receptor (9 files created/expanded) and common-bond (SoA 8.16 updated). New files: staging.md, incident-response.md, network-policies.yaml, serviceaccounts.yaml, falco-rules.yaml, cluster-issuer.yaml, alertmanager-config.yaml.

Phase 4 (CI Keys) completed. 7 tasks marked complete across planner-frontend and workforce-frontend. Changes: ANON_JWT export added to ci.yml Start Supabase step; SERVICE_ROLE_KEY now dynamically extracted (CICD-03); globalSetup.ts updated to use ANON_JWT for signInWithPassword; LOCAL_SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY GitHub Secret deleted from both repos (CICD-03-T3).

Phase 5 (CI Pipeline Hardening) completed. 9 tasks marked complete across 6 repos. Changes: CGEN-01/02 codegen gate now uses git diff instead of --check; CICD-04 --workdir supabase/ added; BACK-02 JWT stubs replaced; CICD-05 timeouts on all jobs; CICD-07 npm/pip cache; ENV-10 deploy-function.yml + edge-function-deployment.md. preference-frontend included for CICD-05/07. 4 new audit branches: planner-frontend, workforce-frontend, preference-frontend, match-backend, receptor-planner all pushed.

Phase 6 (Supply-Chain & Runtime Security) completed. 9 tasks marked complete across 6 repos. Changes: SEC-01 permissions blocks added to all 6 ci.yml; SEC-02 all Actions SHA-pinned; CICD-02 Supabase CLI pinned to 2.75.0; CICD-06 dependabot.yml added to all 6 repos; Renovate github-actions manager added/created in all 6 repos; SEC-04 ADR-004-docker-image-digest-pinning.md added to supabase-receptor; soa.md 8.3 and 8.8 updated.

Phase 7 (Environment Tiers, Backup, pgaudit, Key Rotation, ARCH-06) completed. 12 tasks marked complete; CICD-08 deferred (Vault supersedes GitHub Environments secret scoping). New files: environment-tiers.md, setup.conf.staging.example, setup.conf.prod.example, supabase/schemas/12_extensions/pgaudit.sql, docs/infrastructure/security/audit-logging.md, .github/workflows/key-rotation-reminder.yml. Updated: key-management.md (rewritten), disaster-recovery.md (backup + dual-provider topology), promotion-runbook.md (live URLs), kubernetes-cluster.md (Zot pull-through cache). common-bond soa.md: 8.13 dual-provider backup, 8.15 Implemented (pgaudit), 5.28 Partial. Open tasks: 34.

Phase 7.5 pre-flight interval gate created. 5 gaps and 5 enhancements from comprehensive audit review accepted. recommendations.json amended: ARCH-11 finding added, ARCH-02-T0 / ARCH-03-T0 / ISO-01-T2 tasks added, CICD-10 task descriptions fixed (removed CICD-08 dep), CICD-09 moved Phase 5→8, Phase 7.5 inserted. Slack app created and credentials stored in Vault. Open task count: 38.

Phase 7.5 gate: ADR-008 Vault OIDC bridge, setup.sh idempotency + health gate, 7-run runner trial protocol, smoke-test composite action + staging workflow, ci-required-checks v2, ISO-01 test org cleanup in all 3 frontends

Session 11 (Phase 8 Gate 8A+8B). 10 tasks completed. Gate 8A/8B close-outs confirmed already implemented: --ci/--teardown/--force in setup scripts, seed files already split, test_cleanup.sql + pg_cron live, __test_* convention in testing-guide.md. New code: BACK-01-T1 (receptor-planner pytest scoped), BACK-01-T2 (match-backend integration-tests job with Supabase boot), DOC-06-T1 (ONBOARDING.md), CICD-09-T1 (supabase-start composite action with health poll + masked key outputs). All 3 repos pushed. Open tasks: 22.

sessionGates: Gate 8A: ARCH-02-T1 + ENV-03 — setup.sh CI-native mode + RESET --force flag (supabase-receptor only)
Gate 8B: ISO-01-T1 + ISO-01-T2 + ISO-02-T1 + ENV-04-T1 — test isolation + seed namespacing (supabase-receptor + 3 frontends)
Gate 8C: ARCH-03-T0 verified → ARCH-01-T1 + ARCH-03-T1 + CICD-01-T1 + CICD-09-T1 — runner migration + composite action (all 6 repos, CICD-09 prerequisite in place)
